# catalystcenter_fabric_port_channel (Resource)

Manages a single port channel in SD-Access fabric.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "catalystcenter_fabric_port_channel" "example" {
  network_device_id     = "5e6f7b3a-2b0b-4a7d-8b1c-0d4b1cd5e1b1"
  fabric_id             = "c4b85bb2-ce3f-4db9-a32b-e439a388ac2f"
  interface_names       = ["GigabitEthernet1/0/9"]
  connected_device_type = "EXTENDED_NODE"
  protocol              = "PAGP"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `connected_device_type` (String) Connected device type of the port channel
  - Choices: `TRUNK`, `EXTENDED_NODE`
- `fabric_id` (String) ID of the fabric the device is assigned to
- `interface_names` (Set of String) Set of interface names for the port channel
- `network_device_id` (String) Network device ID of the fabric device
- `protocol` (String) Protocol of the port channel
  - Choices: `ON`, `LACP`, `PAGP`

### Optional

- `allowed_vlan_ranges` (String) Allowed VLAN ranges of the port channel
- `description` (String) Description of the port channel
- `native_vlan_id` (Number) Native VLAN ID of the port channel
- `port_channel_name` (String) Port channel name auto-assigned by Catalyst Center on creation; read-only (any value set in config is ignored).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The id of the object

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import catalystcenter_fabric_port_channel.example "<network_device_id>,<fabric_id>,<id>"
```
